scripts.db:bootstrap: pnpm db:up && pnpm db:wait && pnpm db:migrate
scripts.model:features: pnpm db:wait && uv run --project services/modeling python -m pgatour_ai_modeling.cli generate-features
scripts.model:run: pnpm db:wait && uv run --project services/modeling python -m pgatour_ai_modeling.cli run-model
scripts.model:backtest: pnpm db:wait && uv run --project services/modeling python -m pgatour_ai_modeling.cli run-backtest
scripts.model:smoke: uv run --project services/modeling python -m pgatour_ai_modeling.cli smoke-run
scripts.verify:local: pnpm db:wait && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm data:status && pnpm model:smoke && pnpm --filter @pgatour-ai/ingest typecheck && pnpm --filter @pgatour-ai/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @pgatour-ai/web build
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
